rationale: Bug hunt C25 found 2 state key mismatches in HubAntre.gd: dashboard and runes counter reading nonexistent/wrong keys. Dashboard showed stale defaults, runes counter always 0. Both are data display bugs that make the Hub misleading. Feature: BiomeRadial hover info panel gives players critical decision-making information (guardian, season, difficulty, maturity progress) when choosing a biome.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C26: verify BiomeRadial hover panel renders correctly (font positioning, panel overlap with arc icons, edge case when all biomes locked). Feature candidates: word minigame skeleton for card encounters (core loop gap), or biome-specific walkConfigs for landes_bruyere/cotes_sauvages (extend 3D walk to other biomes).
